body.title: Sleep consolidation: idle-time network wandering + connection discovery
body.result: D353: idle-time network wandering. Discovers co-activated pairs lacking edges, creates Hebbian bindings during quiet periods.
body.description: During idle periods, Igor walks recently-activated nodes (from tails) looking for missing connections. Algorithm: find pairs of recently-co-activated nodes with high cosine similarity but no interpretive_edge → create edge. Also: find frequently-activated but low-connectivity nodes → candidates for integration. Walk seeds: watchlist items, levers, how-things-might-work questions (D176). Biology: hippocampal replay + synaptic homeostasis. Also includes habit health review during idle — scan recent conversations for thread drops, bare acknowledgments, habit misfires. Related: D104 (the-watcher), D082 (curiosity), D272 (boredom-idle-loop).
